title: builder-profile model describes individual contributor identities
content:
# builder-profile model describes individual contributor identities

`powerhouse/builder-profile` (12 ops) defines individual contributor identities in the Powerhouse ecosystem. This is the model that `ServiceOffering.operatorId` references via PHID — the operator who creates and manages a service offering.

## Cross-Model References

- ServiceOffering.`operatorId: PHID` → BuilderProfile (the offering's operator)
- Referenced by [[builders model aggregates builder collections]] as individual entries
- Part of the Organization & Identity zone alongside [[network-profile model represents network-level organizational entities]] and [[operational-hub-profile model defines operational hub configurations]]

Since [[service-offering model defines tiered pricing with option groups and service groups]], the operatorId PHID creates a cross-zone dependency from Service & Pricing to Organization & Identity.

---

description: 12 operations — manages builder (contributor) profiles including skills, contact info, and organizational affiliations; referenced by ServiceOffering.operatorId
